title: Waveform Sculptor
description: Draw oscillator waveforms by hand and hear them instantly — real synth, real harmonics, WAV export.
concept: A synthesizer where you literally sculpt the oscillator waveform by drawing on canvas. The drawn shape is analyzed via DFT and loaded as a custom periodic wave into the Web Audio API. Play it on a piano keyboard (mouse, touch, or computer keys), tune ADSR envelope and a lowpass filter, add reverb/delay, record loops, and export a WAV.
features: Draw, smooth, or erase any waveform shape on canvas
5 preset waveforms (Sine, Saw, Square, Triangle, Noise)
Piano keyboard with 3 octaves, in-scale highlight, computer keyboard support
Record loop and save as WebM

interaction.mouse: Draw on waveform canvas to sculpt the oscillator shape; click piano keys
interaction.keyboard: A–; for white keys, W,E,T,Y,U,O,P for black keys
